email_subject: Application for Administratief medewerker (sales administratie) - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Thomas,

I am writing to apply for the Administratief medewerker (sales administratie) position at Actief Interim Antwerpen. With a background in digital marketing and administrative support, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your client's sales team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client communications, coordinate project timelines, and ensure accurate information flow between teams. I am skilled in planning, organization, and using tools like Google Workspace and CRM systems. My experience in logistics at Katoen Natie has honed my ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and available to start immediately.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with this role. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Thomas,

I am excited to apply for the Administratief medewerker (sales administratie) position at Actief Interim Antwerpen. With a strong foundation in administrative support, client communication, and digital tools, I am eager to contribute to your client's sales team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for managing client websites, coordinating with commercial teams, and ensuring timely delivery of projects. I handle client inquiries via email and phone, prepare proposals, and maintain accurate records. This experience has sharpened my organizational skills and ability to multitask in a dynamic environment.

Previously, I worked at Katoen Natie in logistics, where I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume setting. My technical background includes proficiency in Google Workspace, CRM systems, and data management tools. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and available to start immediately.

I am drawn to this role because it combines administrative tasks with client interaction, and I am confident in my ability to support the sales process from A to Z. I am a quick learner, detail-oriented, and committed to providing excellent service.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proven administrative support experience: managing client communications, coordinating projects, and ensuring accurate information flow.
Strong organizational and planning skills, honed in fast-paced logistics and digital marketing environments.
Proficient in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving.
Tech-savvy with experience in Google Workspace, CRM tools, and data management.
Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, with immediate availability.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I manage client communications, coordinate project timelines, and ensure accurate information flow between teams. I am skilled in planning, organization, and using tools like Google Workspace and CRM systems. My experience in logistics has honed my ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Administrative & Sales Support: client communication (phone/email), proposal preparation, meeting scheduling, contract management, tender support
- Planning & Organization: project coordination, timeline management, multitasking in fast-paced environments
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Technical Tools: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, CRM systems, WordPress, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- SEO & Content: on-page SEO, keyword research, content writing, website management

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client communications and coordinate project timelines, ensuring timely delivery of deliverables
- Prepare proposals and reports for clients, supporting the sales process
- Maintain accurate records of client interactions and project status
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress, including content updates and page management
- Track site performance with analytics tools to guide decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Coordinated with team members to ensure smooth operations

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration
- Implemented structured data and technical SEO audits to improve search visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
